title: 40 treated after marathon
description: KNYSNA NEWS - There was only one serious...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - There was only one serious incident after the Knysna Forest Marathon on Saturday 5 July when a patient entering the medical tent suffered cardiac arrest, according to Jacques Lourens, medical co-ordinator of Frontier Medix.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - There was only one serious incident after the Knysna Forest Marathon on Saturday 5 July when a patient entering the medical tent suffered cardiac arrest, according to Jacques Lourens, medical co-ordinator of Frontier Medix."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lourens said the patient was defibrillated and then transported to hospital in a stable condition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"About 40 runners were treated for a variety of things – from minor scratches and bruises to dehydration, requiring IV (intravenous) therapy.\"","html":"\"About 40 runners were treated for a variety of things – from minor scratches and bruises to dehydration, requiring IV (intravenous) therapy.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said with large events such as the Knysna Forest Marathon, the biggest challenge is logistics, with a full team of medics covering both the routes (five ambulances), a medical access 4x4, a medical tent, and a venue operations centre (VOC).","html":"He said with large events such as the Knysna Forest Marathon, the biggest challenge is logistics, with a full team of medics covering both the routes (five ambulances), a medical access 4x4, a medical tent, and a venue operations centre (VOC)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Final stretch","html":"Final stretch"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We need to co-ordinate all vehicle movements, calls coming into the VOC, as well as all the equipment and gear needed,\" Lourens said.","html":"\"We need to co-ordinate all vehicle movements, calls coming into the VOC, as well as all the equipment and gear needed,\" Lourens said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The most common cases they treated were for dehydration. Although the distances were not extreme, he said, the warmer weather did have its casualties.","html":"The most common cases they treated were for dehydration. Although the distances were not extreme, he said, the warmer weather did have its casualties."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lourens said statistically, the final mile (1.6km) is the highest risk for runners and has the highest likelihood of a cardiac event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We always keep this in mind and make provisions for runners as they come into the final stretch. We also have a spotter that stands at the arch (race end) for such eventualities,\" said Lourens.","html":"\"We always keep this in mind and make provisions for runners as they come into the final stretch. We also have a spotter that stands at the arch (race end) for such eventualities,\" said Lourens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: A sea of enjoyment for nearly 8 000 Knysna Forest Marathon runners","html":"Previous article: A sea of enjoyment for nearly 8 000 Knysna Forest Marathon runners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
